prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 16537→14927→12571→10322→9279，呈持续上升趋势（位次数字逐年减小），近 4 年累计前移约 7258 名，2025 年基准约 9279 名；该校在江苏物理类招生计划 2021 年 71 人、2022 年 73 人、2023 年 55 人、2024 年 48 人、2025 年 54 人；2026 年计划 71 人，较 2025 年大幅扩招约 31.5%，扩招幅度显著，理论上会缓解竞争压力，推高位次数字。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 50 名持续上升至 2026 年第 43 名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强；2026 年声誉评价中未见哈尔滨工程大学明显负面舆情；抖音学校热度总排名第 27 位，评价为「较热」，短视频平台曝光度较高，反映报考关注度升温；投档异常文件中无该校断档记录，历史录取平稳；控制科学与工程为 A 级学科（第五轮评估），船舶与海洋工程、核工程与核技术、水声工程等「三海一核」特色学科群实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、 自动化类、电子信息类等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；江苏省物理类考生数从 2021 年 16.6 万增至 2025 年 26.1 万，2026 年总考生约 52.1 万（按历史比例估算物理类约 37.9 万），考生规模大幅增长约 45.6%，竞争显著加剧；省控线（本科批）从 2021 年 417 分升至 2025 年 463 分，整体呈上升趋势；该校位于黑龙江哈尔滨，属东北地区，对江苏考生而言属于跨省就读，地域偏好上可能略逊于长三角高校，但「国防七子」品牌效应和工 科实力可部分抵消地域劣势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移的强势走势、2026 年大幅扩招 31.5% 的供给增加、江苏省物理类考生大幅增长约 45.6% 的需求激增、学校排名稳步提升及抖音热度较高等因素，扩招效应与考生增长效应相互对冲，但考生增幅大于扩招增幅，且学校声誉和排名提升吸引更多高分考生关注，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2025 年基准 9279 名基础上后移至约 11232 名（位次数字增大），区间 10732–11732 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 16537→14927→12571→10322→9279, showing a continuous upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year). Over the past 4 years, it has moved forward by about 7258 places, with a baseline of about 9279 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangsu Physics Category was 71 in 2021, 73 in 2022, 55 in 2023, 48 in 2024, and 54 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 71, a significant expansion of about 31.5% compared to 2025, which theoretically eases competition pressure and pushes ranking numbers higher.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has risen from 50th in 2021 to 43rd in 2026, showing steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2026 reputation evaluation, no significant negative public opinion was found for Harbin Engineering University. The university's Douyin popularity ranks 27th overall, rated as 'relatively hot', with high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting increased attention for applications. There are no records of enrollment gaps in the abnormal filing documents, indicating stable historical admissions. Control Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline (fifth round evaluation), and the 'Three Seas and One Nuclear' characteristic discipline cluster, including Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology, and Underwater Acoustics Engineering, has outstanding strength, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Automation, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity. The number of Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu increased from 166,000 in 2021 to 261,000 in 2025, and in 2026, total examinees are about 521,000 (estimated Physics Category about 379,000 based on historical proportion), a significant increase of about 45.6%, sharply intensifying competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose from 417 in 2021 to 463 in 2025, showing an overall upward trend. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang, in the Northeast region, which for Jiangsu examinees means cross-province enrollment, with regional preference possibly slightly lower than for universities in the Yangtze River Delta, but the 'Seven Sons of National Defense' brand effect and engineering strength can partially offset regional disadvantages.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of continuous forward movement in historical rankings, the significant 31.5% enrollment expansion in 2026, the sharp 45.6% increase in Jiangsu Physics Category examinees, the steady rise in university ranking, and high Douyin popularity, the expansion effect and examinee growth effect offset each other, but examinee growth exceeds expansion growth, and the university's reputation and ranking attract more high-scoring examinees. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift backward (ranking number increases) from the 2025 baseline of 9279 to approximately 11232, with a range of 10732–11732.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 10732–11732, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application range, Tier 1 majors (Xinghai Leading Class/Experimental Class) as reach targets, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<10732), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>11732), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as supplementary.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次明显后移的走势、2026 年继续扩招 21.1% 的供给增加、历史类考生大幅增长约 45.7% 的需求激增，以及该校文科专业与优势学科关联度低等因素，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2025 年基准 8106 名基础上后移至约 9280 名（位次数字增大），区间 8780–9780 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 7703→7093→6866→8106, with a continuous forward shift from 2022 to 2024, and a significant backward shift of about 1240 places in 2025, with a baseline of about 8106 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangsu for History Category was 5 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 10 in 2024, 19 in 2025, and 23 in 2026, an increase of about 21.1% compared to 2025, with continuous expansion over the years and increasing supply.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked 43rd on the Soft Science main list, with steady improvement in recent years; no significant negative public opinion in the 2026 reputation evaluation; ranked 27th in Douyin popularity, rated as 'relatively hot', with high application attention; no record of enrollment gaps; Control Science and Engineering is A-level, but the History Category majors (Law, Ideological and Political Education, Sociology, Business Administration, English) have low correlation with the university's strong engineering disciplines, limiting disciplinary appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law and Ideological and Political Education is stable; the number of History Category examinees in Jiangsu increased from 95,000 in 2021 to 97,000 in 2025, and in 2026, the total examinees are about 521,000 (estimated History Category about 141,000 based on historical proportion), a significant increase of about 45.7%, intensifying competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose from 476 in 2021 to 482 in 2025; the university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang, which is an out-of-province study for Jiangsu History Category examinees, and the university is strong in engineering with a small scale of liberal arts majors, resulting in limited regional and disciplinary match.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the continued enrollment expansion of 21.1% in 2026, the sharp increase in History Category examinees by about 45.7%, and the low correlation between liberal arts majors and the university's advantageous disciplines, it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 8106 to approximately 9280 (ranking number increases), with a range of 8780–9780.
